title: mentha glomerata var. paludosa
intro: Mentha glomerata var. paludosa, also known as marsh pennyroyal, is a variety of the mint plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory, making it effective in treating wounds and digestive issues. The health benefits of marsh pennyroyal include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of marsh pennyroyal can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
